impact: This advances the PP&D fixture-first crawl pipeline by proving planned public fetch records can be mapped to read-only ipfs_datasets_py processor backend metadata without network access or processor invocation.
summary: Add fixture-only processor handoff crawl-plan validation for planned PP&D public fetches.
target_task: Task checkbox-65: Task checkbox-60: Add a fixture-only crawl-plan to processor-handoff validation test that proves each planned public fetch can map to the existing `ipfs_datasets_py/ipfs_datasets_py/processors` backend metadata without invoking network or processor code.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
